summary: Complete testing of new SportLyo features: logos display correctly in all locations, registration form includes all new fields, all backend endpoints work. 16/16 backend tests passed, all 9 frontend features verified.
passed_tests: Test 1: Navbar displays logo-dark.png (dark logo on white background) - PASSED
Test 2: Footer displays logo-light.png (light logo on dark bg-asphalt background) - PASSED
Test 3: Coming Soon page displays logo-light.png (light logo on dark bg-asphalt background) - PASSED
Test 4: Registration form shows first_name field (Prénom) - PASSED
Test 5: Registration form shows last_name field (Nom) - PASSED
Test 6: Registration form shows gender field (Sexe) as Select - PASSED
Test 7: Registration form shows birth_date field (Date de naissance) as date input - PASSED
Test 8: POST /api/registrations accepts first_name, last_name, gender, birth_date - PASSED
Test 9: POST /api/checkin/scan endpoint works (no duplicate routes) - PASSED
Test 10: GET /api/checkin/stats/{event_id} returns correct structure - PASSED
Test 11: POST /api/rfid-read endpoint works (MOCKED - no real hardware) - PASSED
Backend: RFID validation and unmatched chip handling - PASSED
Backend: Auth requirements on protected endpoints - PASSED
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Logos use correct versions (logo-dark.png for light backgrounds in Navbar, logo-light.png for dark backgrounds in Footer and Coming Soon page). 2) Registration form now includes Prénom (first_name), Nom (last_name), Sexe (gender as Select with M/F options), and Date de naissance (birth_date as date input). 3) Backend endpoints all functional: /api/checkin/scan, /api/checkin/stats/{event_id}, /api/rfid-read, /api/organizer/events/{event_id}/export-timing. The RFID endpoint is MOCKED (no real hardware integration).

mocked_apis.RFID_integration: POST /api/rfid-read is simulated - no real hardware connection (MOCKED)

registration_form_new_fields: gender (Sexe) - Select dropdown with options 'Homme' (M) and 'Femme' (F)
birth_date (Date de naissance) - date input (mm/dd/yyyy format)
backend_endpoints_tested: POST /api/checkin/scan - QR/bib scan for day-of check-in (requires organizer/admin auth)
POST /api/rfid-read - RFID timing data from external systems (MOCKED)
GET /api/organizer/events/{event_id}/export-timing - CSV export for timing software
